title: Agent Knowledge System Rebrand
description: Project-wide rename and repositioning: documentation-template → agent-knowledge-system. Shift from 'docs framework' framing to 'knowledge + task system created and fine-tuned for AI.' Name locked 2026-07-08: CLI `agent-ks`, skills agent-ks-docs / agent-ks-issues / agent-ks-artifacts, plugin → agent-ks. Covers the new repo, marketplace update, old-repo archive, and the ./start self-migration flow.
author: sidhantha
